selector.note: Line number recorded for orientation only; the stable identity is the unique literal 'sulfur segment' within the '% Panel A' marker block. VC002's 'Sulfur-rich' (line 23) is a different literal in the same block and is NOT this target.

semantic_object.denotes: the left S-S-S-S homocatenated sulfur run of the poly(S-r-DIB) repeat unit
semantic_object.sibling_parallel: panelA.dib_derived_segment_label (line 47, sits below its ring at y=1.42)

semantic_relation.labels: panelA.sulfur_chain (four S atoms at panel-x 1.55/2.00/2.45/2.90, y=2.45)
semantic_relation.must_not_imply: membership of the label glyphs in the panel border geometry or the neighboring atom circles

protected_invariants: label_text_literal: 'sulfur segment' unchanged (reposition only, no re-wording)

editable_target.edit_budget: one node line; attributes and coordinates only, no new draw/leader commands
editable_target.forbidden_change: text content, font/style token, any other line
